title: Neighborhood Watch Bulletin
text:
## Neighborhood Watch Bulletin

**Alert level:** {adjective}

**Reported activity:** A {person} was seen {verb ending in -ing} near the {place} at {number} AM.

**Suspect description:** Wearing a {color} {clothing item}, carrying {plural noun}, and making a {sound}.

**Vehicle:** Possibly a {adjective} {vehicle} with {plural noun} on the roof.

**Safety tips:**
- Do not {verb} strangers
- Lock your {object}

**Meeting:** {day of week} at the community {place}.
